.env.example contains P12 deployment variable names with empty values only.

apps/api/src/phase12Deployment.ts implements deterministic env validation for production_like/production targets, URL checks, secret-reference validation, external-service mode checks, fixture-only switch denial, and redaction-by-design DTOs.
GET /health/deployment exposes safe deployment-smoke readback without returning raw secret values or secret references.

rows.requirement: Operator release readiness surfaces and governed ops commands
evidence: docs/phases/PHASE_12_PRODUCTION_SAAS_HARDENING_MARKET_RELEASE.md freezes P12-006 scope and acceptance criteria before implementation.
apps/api/src/phase12Readiness.ts implements resettable tenant-scoped release-readiness run state with latestRun readback, run detail readback, immutable run snapshots, and deterministic run ids.

apps/api/src/app.ts exposes GET /api/ops/release-readiness, POST /api/ops/release-readiness/run, GET /api/ops/release-readiness/runs/:runId, and GET /api/ops/audit; governed run requires release.readiness.execute, readback requires release.readiness.read, audit requires ops.audit.read, and cross-tenant run reads return 404 without leaking data.

apps/web/src/App.tsx wires the P12 operator readiness surface and navigation entry without changing shared TanStack Query foundation ownership.
